title: Riccio Fishing Utils (RFU)
description: Riccio Fishing Utils is a Client-side mod for hypixel skyblock focused on fishing.
body:
RiccioFishingUtils

Minecraft Mod for Hypixel SkyBlock ![rfu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ricciow/RiccioFishingUtils-Modern/refs/heads/main/src/main/resources/assets/rfu/icon.png)
## What it does RiccioFishingUtils is a Fabric Mod for Minecraft 1.21.10-1.21.11 and 26.1.x that adds many useful features to [Hypixel SkyBlock](https://wiki.hypixel.net/Fishing) focused mostly on fishing. * **Party Finder:** Get parties for your fishing duties! * **Lootshare Range** See the range of lootshare on your mobs! * **Boss Healthbars** Easily see your Jawbus HP! * **Achievements** Goals for all the sweaty fishers out there! * **And much more!**
